summary: Iteration 92: Mood Insights & Trends, Crystal Pairing Share, Blessing Notifications - All features working correctly. Backend APIs tested (12/12 passed). Frontend UI verified with Playwright.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 92 features fully tested. Key data-testids: mood-tracker-page, mood-search, mood-group-all/positive/challenged/spiritual, mood-insights, mood-ai-insight, crystal-pairing-panel, share-pairing-btn, narrate-pairing-btn, nav-notification-btn, notif-badge, notification-inbox, mark-all-read, notif-item-{id}.

mood_insights_api.details: GET /api/moods/insights returns mood analytics (top_moods, weekly, avg_intensity, logging_streak, ai_insight) for users with 3+ moods. Returns {has_data: false} for users with no moods.

mood_tracker_ui.details: Mood Tracker page shows insights panel with stats cards (Day Streak, Logged, Avg Feel), Most Frequent Emotions bar chart, This Week activity chart, and AI Insight section. Search bar and group filters (All/Positive/Challenged/Spiritual) work correctly. 37 mood buttons available (exceeds 33 requirement).

crystal_pairing_share.details: Crystal Pairing page shows Share button next to Listen button after generating a pairing. Share button uses Web Share API with clipboard fallback.

crystal_pairing_share_api.details: GET /api/crystals/pairing/{id}/share returns pairing data (public endpoint). Returns 404 for invalid IDs.

blessing_notifications.details: POST /api/blessings/send creates in-app notification for recipient when to_user_id is provided. Notification includes title, message, color, and link.

notification_inbox_api.details: GET /api/notifications/inbox returns in-app notifications with unread_count. POST /api/notifications/read/{id} marks notification as read. POST /api/notifications/read-all marks all notifications as read.

notification_bell_ui.details: Notification bell in nav shows unread count badge when there are unread notifications. Clicking bell opens NotificationInbox dropdown with notification list, timestamps, and mark-all-read button.
